entities.name: RESISTANCE TO DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: The ability of the pearl millet hybrid NHB-3 to resist infection by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: Geographic region where the cultivar is generally susceptible to the pathogen

entities.name: DURGAPURA
entities.description: Research station in Rajasthan where a specific isolate of the pathogen was found

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTRE
entities.description: Research center where a highly pathogenic isolate of the pathogen was found

entities.name: INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of introducing oospores or sporangia into the host plant

entities.name: OOSPORES AND SPORANGIA
entities.description: Infective stages of the Sclerospora graminicola pathogen

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY
entities.description: The ability of the Sclerospora graminicola population to cause disease in the host
